films.title: Pi
films.overview: A mathematical genius discovers a link between numbers and reality, and thus believes he can predict the future.

films.title: The Fountain
films.overview: Spanning over one thousand years, and three parallel stories, The Fountain is a story of love, death, spirituality, and the fragility of our existence in this world.

films.title: Requiem for a Dream
films.overview: The drug-induced utopias of four Coney Island residents are shattered when their addictions run deep.

films.title: The Wrestler
films.overview: Aging wrestler Randy "The Ram" Robinson is long past his prime but still ready and rarin' to go on the pro-wrestling circuit. After a particularly brutal beating, however, Randy hangs up his tights, pursues a serious relationship with a long-in-the-tooth stripper, and tries to reconnect with his estranged daughter. But he can't resist the lure of the ring and readies himself for a comeback.

films.title: Black Swan
films.overview: A committed dancer struggles to maintain her sanity after winning the lead role in a production of Tchaikovsky's "Swan Lake".

films.title: Noah
films.overview: A man who suffers visions of an apocalyptic deluge takes measures to protect his family from the coming flood.

films.title: mother!
films.overview: A couple's relationship is tested when uninvited guests arrive at their home, disrupting their tranquil existence.

films.title: Caught Stealing
films.overview: Burned-out ex-baseball player Hank Thompson unexpectedly finds himself embroiled in a dangerous struggle for survival amidst the criminal underbelly of late 1990s New York City, forced to navigate a treacherous underworld he never imagined.

films.title: The Whale
films.overview: A reclusive English teacher suffering from severe obesity attempts to reconnect with his estranged teenage daughter for one last chance at redemption.
